edge_hypothesis: The existing Supertrend specs test ADX thresholds of 5 (ranging), 15 (moderate), and 25 (trending). The advisory shows ADX>25 = PF 1.42 on 4h but with only 22 trades (below the 30-trade gate). The st5k2r8w spec moved to 1h to solve the trade count problem. This spec tests a DIFFERENT hypothesis: what happens at ADX thresholds ABOVE 25? At ADX > 30 or 35, the market is in a STRONG established trend. A Supertrend direction flip at this point signals something extraordinary — either a violent trend reversal or a parabolic acceleration. These events are rare but produce outsized moves because: (a) trapped traders on the wrong side create a cascade of stop-outs, (b) the strong-ADX environment means volatility is elevated, which means ATR-based TPs represent larger absolute moves, (c) the Supertrend indicator's 7-period/3.0-factor setting is specifically designed to catch trend changes, not oscillations — at high ADX it filters out ALL minor noise. The risk: trade count could be extremely low (<20 on 4h). Solution: test on 1h where 4x more bars produce 4x more potential signals. At ADX>30 with 10:1 R:R on 1h, we're building an 'event harvester' — a strategy that trades rarely but captures regime-shift moves. Invalidation: if trade count < 20 even on 1h, ADX>30 is too restrictive for any template. If PF < 1.2 at 10:1, the signal quality at high ADX isn't actually better than lower thresholds.

variants.name: supertrend_1h_high_adx_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/1h with high ADX gate (>30) and 10:1 R:R. Only trades when ADX confirms a STRONG trend is in place, then Supertrend signals a direction change within that strong trend. These are rare, high-conviction signals. 2.0x ATR stop, 20.0x ATR TP. Expected: 30-60 trades on 1h (vs 22 on 4h at ADX>25), each representing a genuine regime shift. Win rate ~10-15% but each winner = 10x risk.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction reversal — bullish).
ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend environment — this flip is a high-conviction signal).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction reversal — bearish).
ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend environment — bearish flip in strong trend).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (20.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if trades < 20, ADX>30 is too restrictive on 1h — lower to ADX>25
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 20.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — trend reversal signal
ADX_14 > 30 — only trade in STRONG trend environments for high-conviction signals
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 20.0x TP — 10:1 R:R event harvesting

variants.name: supertrend_1h_extreme_adx_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/1h with very high ADX gate (>35) and 8:1 R:R. ADX > 35 is rare — it represents the top ~10% of trend strength readings. A Supertrend flip at this level means a VERY strong trend just changed direction — this is a capitulation/reversal event. The 8:1 R:R (2.0x stop, 16.0x TP) is moderate-extreme. This variant tests whether ultra-selective entry quality (ADX>35) compensates for the lower R:R. Expected: 15-30 trades. If PF > 1.5 with fewer trades than ADX>30 variant, signal quality increases monotonically with ADX — and the optimal strategy is maximum selectivity.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend bullish reversal).
ADX_14 > 35 (extreme trend strength — this flip is a rare, high-conviction event).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend bearish reversal).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (16.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if trades < 15, ADX>35 is too extreme even for 1h — this is a hard constraint of crypto ADX distribution
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 16.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — trend reversal signal
ADX_14 > 35 — ultra-selective, only extreme trend strength environments
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 16.0x TP — 8:1 R:R on rare event signals

variants.name: supertrend_4h_strong_accel_12to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip on ETH/4h with ADX > 30 and extreme 12:1 R:R (2.0x stop, 24.0x TP). This is the highest R:R variant — pushing the frontier beyond the MACD 7:1 that has been tested. At ADX>30 on 4h, trade count will be low (likely 15-25), but each trade represents a major trend event. At 12:1, we need only ~10% win rate to be profitable. The 4h timeframe means each bar = 4 hours, so 24.0x ATR TP requires a multi-day move — but ADX>30 events on 4h ARE multi-day events by definition. This is the system's most extreme tail harvester: rarest signals, highest targets.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend bullish reversal on 4h).
ADX_14 > 30 (strong trend environment on 4h — major trend event).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend bearish reversal on 4h).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (24.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if trades < 15, this is a data-insufficient test — results directionally useful but not statistically significant. If PF < 1.0, 12:1 is past the R:R cliff for Supertrend.
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 24.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — trend reversal on 4h
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 24.0x TP — 12:1 R:R extreme frontier, highest tail harvester in system
